queries.question: Display onboard services and inflight entertainments available on Boeing 787 Dreamliner.
queries.sql:
SELECT OnboardServices.service_name as name
FROM OnboardServices JOIN Aircrafts ON OnboardServices.aircraft_id = Aircrafts.id
WHERE Aircrafts.model = "Boeing 787 Dreamliner"
UNION
SELECT InflightEntertainments.entertainment_name as name
FROM InflightEntertainments JOIN Aircrafts ON InflightEntertainments.aircraft_id = Aircrafts.id
WHERE Aircrafts.model = "Boeing 787 Dreamliner"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?onboardservices a :OnboardServices .
    ?aircrafts a :Aircraft .
    ?onboardservices p:hasAircrafts ?aircrafts .
    ?onboardservices p:service_name ?service_name .
    ?aircrafts p:model ?model_f .
    FILTER(STR(?model_f) = "Boeing 787 Dreamliner")
    BIND(?service_name AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?inflightentertainments a :InflightEntertainments .
    ?aircrafts a :Aircraft .
    ?inflightentertainments p:hasAircrafts ?aircrafts .
    ?inflightentertainments p:entertainment_name ?entertainment_name .
    ?aircrafts p:model ?model_f .
    FILTER(STR(?model_f) = "Boeing 787 Dreamliner")
    BIND(?entertainment_name AS ?o0)
  }
}
